title: Mysore, Karnataka — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mysore, Karnataka: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mysore is a city in Karnataka with a population of 1,100,000. The City of Palaces, known for its royal heritage, magnificent Mysore Palace, Dasara festival, and sandalwood and silk industries.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
